description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding cabinet with a rectangular shape and a modern, minimalist design. The cabinet features a light wood grain finish on the top, sides, and back, while the front doors are a smooth, solid white, likely made of laminate or painted wood. The front view reveals two tall doors with a subtle vertical seam, and the back view shows two small, round keyholes, suggesting lockable compartments. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. There are no visible handles on the front, indicating a push-to-open mechanism or concealed pulls.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with smooth white front doors and a flat, sturdy top. It features a minimalist design with no visible handles and small feet for elevation.
description_view_0: Front view showing two tall, smooth white doors with a vertical seam and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the light wood finish and two small, round keyholes for locking.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, showing the wood grain and cabinet depth.
